testcase.name: testLogin_Failed_UnregisteredUser

failure.message: Không tìm thấy thông báo lỗi: 基幹システムに登録されていません。 expected [true] but found [false]

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.cssSelector: a[href*='/login/microsoft'] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
